fast_path.reason: TeLLMe route is multi_agent, not single_agent

template_metadata.description: Intersection approaches submit traffic requests to a signal controller. The controller permits bounded phases, can prioritize emergency vehicles, can coordinate pedestrian crossings, and terminates in all-red on failure.
template_metadata.generated_agent_pattern: signal_controller + one approach agent per selected approach + optional emergency_detector + optional pedestrian_crossing_agent
template_metadata.generated_channel_pattern: bidirectional controller/approach command channels, plus optional emergency and pedestrian request/command channels

coord_template.user_query_excerpt: Create a CityOS coordination application for three medication-delivery robots that share one narrow hospital corridor. R
coord_template.template_priority_reason: two-agent workflow retained because fewer than three independent evidence sources were detected

summary.recommended_next_fix: Inspect TLC state-space size and use bounded development constants without skipping TLC.

limitations: OpenCode timing observes the subprocess and its first JSON event, not provider first-token telemetry.
A long time-to-first-event can indicate OpenCode startup, provider queueing, or model latency.
